evals.prompt: Run crustdata signals on serverobotics.com with 180 day hiring window
evals.expected_output: Signal summary with funding, growth, and hiring data for Serve Robotics
expectations: JSON saved to outputs/ folder with enrich + recent_hires data
Funding signal mentions post-IPO equity or Series funding
Growth signal shows YoY headcount increase
Recent hires tab populated with people who joined in last 180 days
Offers to write results to Google Sheet or create new one

evals.prompt: Enrich these 3 domains with crustdata: prenosis.com, thirdway.health, paradigmhealth.ai. Use 90 day hire window. Write results to a new sheet.
evals.expected_output: Batch enrichment of 3 domains with 5 tabs written to a new Google Sheet
expectations: Script processes all 3 domains sequentially with rate limiting
Each domain gets its own JSON backup file
sheets_writer.py creates new sheet with --create-new flag
Signal Summary tab has 3 rows (one per domain)
Funding tab has variable rows (one per round per company)
Asks user about deleting JSON files after sheet write

evals.prompt: Pull crustdata signals from this sheet https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/ABC123/edit, tab 'Prospects', domain column B, 365 day hiring window. Write back to the same sheet.
evals.expected_output: Reads domains from sheet, enriches all, writes 5 new tabs back to same sheet
expectations: Extracts spreadsheet ID ABC123 from URL
Script runs with --sheet-id ABC123 --tab Prospects --domain-col B --hire-days 365
sheets_writer.py writes to same spreadsheet with --spreadsheet-id ABC123
5 tabs created: Signal Summary, Recent Hires, Funding, Company Growth, Dept Growth
Run summary saved as .md file in runs/ folder
